author: phase-4-coordinator
content:
Implemented together with #457. New *_axes functions accept axes: Option<&[usize]> which handles:
- None or Some(&[]): reduce all axes
- Some(&[0]): single axis
- Some(&[0, 2]): multiple axes

The reduce_axes_general helper partitions axes into keep/reduce sets and computes the full output by iterating the Cartesian product of reduced axes for each keep-position. Tested with 3D array, shape (2,3,4) reduced over axes (0,2) producing shape (3,) — verified against hand-computed NumPy results.

22 new tests including normalize_axes edge cases, multi-axis 3D sum, keepdims 3D, argmin/argmax keepdims, var/std multi-axis. 110 ferray-stats lib tests pass (was 88). Closing as completed.
